card_descriptions.Anger: Deal 6 damage. Add a copy of this card to your discard pile.
card_descriptions.Armaments: Gain 5 Block. Upgrade a card in your hand for the rest of combat.
card_descriptions.Body Slam: Deal damage equal to your current Block.
card_descriptions.Clash: Can only be played if every card in your hand is an Attack. Deal 14 damage.
card_descriptions.Flex: Gain 2 Strength. At the end of your turn, lose 2 Strength.
card_descriptions.Havoc: Play the top card of your draw pile and Exhaust it.
card_descriptions.Headbutt: Deal 9 damage. Place a card from your discard pile on top of your draw pile.
card_descriptions.Heavy Blade: Deal 14 damage. Strength affects Heavy Blade 3 times.
card_descriptions.Perfected Strike: Deal 6 damage. Deals an additional 2 damage for ALL of your cards containing "Strike".
card_descriptions.Sword Boomerang: Deal 3 damage to a random enemy 3 times.
card_descriptions.Thunderclap: Deal 4 damage and apply 1 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.
card_descriptions.True Grit: Gain 7 Block. Exhaust a random card from your hand.
card_descriptions.Warcry: Draw 1 card. Place a card from your hand on top of your draw pile. Exhaust.
card_descriptions.Wild Strike: Deal 12 damage. Shuffle a Wound into your draw pile.
card_descriptions.Battle Trance: Draw 3 cards. You cannot draw additional cards this turn.
card_descriptions.Blood for Blood: Costs 1 less energy for each time you lose HP in combat. Deal 18 damage.
card_descriptions.Combust: At the end of your turn, lose 1 HP and deal 5 damage to ALL enemies.
card_descriptions.Dark Embrace: Whenever a card is Exhausted, draw 1 card.
card_descriptions.Dropkick: Deal 5 damage. If the enemy is Vulnerable, gain 1 energy and draw 1 card.
card_descriptions.Dual Wield: Create a copy of an Attack or Power card in your hand.
card_descriptions.Evolve: Whenever you draw a Status card, draw 1 card.
card_descriptions.Feel No Pain: Whenever a card is Exhausted, gain 3 Block.
card_descriptions.Fire Breathing: Whenever you draw a Status or Curse card, deal 6 damage to all enemies.
card_descriptions.Flame Barrier: Gain 12 Block. Whenever you are attacked this turn, deal 4 damage to the attacker.
card_descriptions.Infernal Blade: Add a random Attack to your hand. It costs 0 this turn. Exhaust.
card_descriptions.Intimidate: Apply 1 Weak to ALL enemies. Exhaust.
card_descriptions.Metallicize: At the end of your turn, gain 3 Block.
card_descriptions.Power Through: Add 2 Wounds to your hand. Gain 15 Block.
card_descriptions.Rage: Whenever you play an Attack this turn, gain 3 Block.
card_descriptions.Rampage: Deal 8 damage. Increase this card's damage by 5 this combat.
card_descriptions.Reckless Charge: Deal 10 damage. Shuffle a Dazed into your draw pile.
card_descriptions.Rupture: Whenever you lose HP from a card, gain 1 Strength.
card_descriptions.Searing Blow: Deal 12 damage. Can be upgraded any number of times.
card_descriptions.Second Wind: Exhaust all non-Attack cards in your hand and gain 5 Block for each card Exhausted.
card_descriptions.Sentinel: Gain 5 Block. If this card is Exhausted, gain 2 energy.
card_descriptions.Sever Soul: Exhaust all non-Attack cards in your hand. Deal 16 damage.
card_descriptions.Shockwave: Apply 3 Weak and  Vulnerable to ALL enemies. Exhaust.
card_descriptions.Spot Weakness: If the enemy intends to attack, gain 4 Strength.
card_descriptions.Uppercut: Deal 13 damage. Apply 1 Weak. Apply 1 Vulnerable.
card_descriptions.Whirlwind: Deal 5 damage to ALL enemies X times.
card_descriptions.Barricade: Block is not removed at the start of your turn.
card_descriptions.Berserk: Gain 2 Vulnerable. At the start of your turn, gain 1 Energy.
card_descriptions.Brutality: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and draw 1 card.
card_descriptions.Corruption: Skills cost 0. Whenever you play a Skill, Exhaust it.
card_descriptions.Demon Form: At the start of each turn, gain 2 Strength.
card_descriptions.Double Tap: This turn, your next Attack is played twice.
card_descriptions.Exhume: Put a card from your Exhaust pile into your hand. Exhaust.
card_descriptions.Feed: Deal 10 damage. If this kills a non-minion enemy, gain 3 permanent Max HP. Exhaust.
card_descriptions.Fiend Fire: Exhaust all cards in your hand. Deal 7 damage for each Exhausted card. Exhaust.
card_descriptions.Immolate: Deal 21 damage to ALL enemies. Add a Burn into your discard pile.
card_descriptions.Juggernaut: Whenever you gain  Block, deal 5 damage to a random enemy.
card_descriptions.Offering: Lose 6 HP. Gain 2 energy. Draw 3 cards. Exhaust.
card_descriptions.Reaper: Deal 4 damage to ALL enemies. Heal HP equal to unblocked damage. Exhaust.
